label: Phase ordering is research -> rename -> Lane C build -> validation/docs
Phase 002 scaffold already scopes skill dir, SKILL.md, commands, mirrors, advisor, metadata, sentinel, root docs, and internal refs
SKILL.md frontmatter, triggers, and keywords still declare deep-agent-improvement
Lane names and command verbs should stay stable unless a separate decision changes them
Command entrypoints and YAML workflows hard-code old skill wording and old skill paths
Runtime mirrors across OpenCode, Claude, Gemini, and Codex must be renamed as one unit
Advisor has split Python and TypeScript scorer surfaces that must move coherently
Advisor graph, graph metadata, and regression fixtures contain separate stale-id risks
deep-model-benchmark should remain a command bridge while penalties retarget deep-improvement
sk-prompt-models risk is indirect through advisor graph edges, not local runtime logic
Internal README, feature catalog, playbook, script docs, and root docs are live rename surfaces
Historical/archive references require an allowlist so final grep does not force false edits
